releaseNotes: • Multi-view fix: on sources that cycle connections (e.g. 1-connection providers in a 2×2 grid), the silent quick-reconnect budget never replenished, so every cell hit its limit after a few minutes and did a visible full restart — spinner plus a fresh "Building buffer…" pause — over and over. A clean provider drop now counts as a disturbance for the 15-second stability clock, so the budget refills between drops and cells recover with a brief freeze-frame indefinitely. The stability buffer is built once per cell and full restarts stop.
